title: justicia loureiroana
intro: Justicia loureiroana, also known as the golden fortunella or golden jasmine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Justicia loureiroana include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating anxiety and stress. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using them in teas, and it is also used in some traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
